issue.title: DebugGlobalVariable instructions are missing from SPIR-V output
issue.body:
## Issue Description

When compiling Slang shaders to SPIR-V with debug information (`-g2`), no `DebugGlobalVariable` instructions are generated for global variables (like `Texture2D` and `SamplerState` shader parameters). This results in incomplete debug information where global variables are not visible to debuggers.

This is a missing functionality in the SPIR-V debug information generation, similar to how `DebugLocalVariable` was fixed in PR #7516.

## Expected Behavior

Global variables should have `DebugGlobalVariable` instructions generated with appropriate scope information, enabling debuggers to locate and display global variables.

comment.body: @claude can you land a PR to fix this issue.
